reviews.review_description:
I've been playing quite a while this game, SPRAY. the game is well done, you can choose different locations to "spray" your fantasy : there are rooftops from different cities, alleys and some sprayable items in the scenario. You have some white walls and you can use different kinds of sprays (thinner>thicker mark) and on the ground you'll find lots of cans featuring different colors, you can pick them and use them. The physics is well done and there are tons of options to change all kinds of values about the spray/drops/density etc etc, you just have to master them to achieve your perfect experience. I truly hope the devs could add some cool stencils to use, and maybe some different surfaces to have fun with. Painting a white wall doesn't give back a real "graffiti vibe", if you know what I mean!
Some minor advices to the devs: the spray cans emit a color beam, once dropped to the ground, which could interfere with the drawings according to where you drop them. Removing them could be a good improvement to the overall feeling. Plus, I'd suggest to add the possibility to switch between colors while holding your can, without having to go back in the scenario to pick up the main sprays. Would be awesome to make the custom spray can reflect your chosen custom color 👌👌

I'm confident these minor flaws will be fixed in the next updates, as the devs are very focused on this project!

reviews.review_title: Great simple Spray game w. MR capability
reviews.review_description:
Theres multiple ui where you can edit the quality and details of the different sprays making it a pretty unique experience compared to other spray games

Theres a built in web that plays graffiti tutorials on YouTube so its great to be able to practice while following along.

Theres a passthrough mode so you can bring the billboard canvas anywhere in the realworld with you. 

Players get 6 save slots to save their work and come back to it laters… theres multiplayer but it doesnt seem set up roght now. Excited to be able on to spray with my friends in the future

Controls are smooth, works well.

Recommend

developer_response.body: Thanks for the indepth review & playing!

reviews.review_title: Clean & Smooth Spray painting in VR
reviews.review_description:
Super wicked to be able to watch Lukas Kasper, S1VE, GraffitiBloq, and other graffiti artists while spraying on the canvas. The tutorial playlist is awesome for beginners. Appreciate the low entry price for a pretty high quality experience.

Looking forward to different caps and spray styles coming to the game and future updates. 

Great for anyone looking to learn how to spray or anyone looking to have a quick creative time

developer_response.body: worked insanely hard to optimize and get this running smoothly on the quest 2 and only with 1 controller because i only have one controller on my quest 3 (the other one is broken LMAO)

reviews.review_title: Amazing for a quick creative experience
reviews.review_description:
I found myself wanting to jump in when ever i was feeling a creative. Id put on some music on the browser or a movie/show and spray paint random things.

Im not good at spray paint or painting but this reminds me of messing around on paint on windows… 

Theres only a couple of spray patterns but its cool that they can be adjusted to have more or less spray dots, drips, and more. 

The physics are pretty good not perfect but definitely looking forward to more here. Dev seems dedicated and updating constantly.

W spray painting game

Theres live tutorials to follow while spray painting. Huge W. The frame rate is really good and the quality is really good. The game should be worth more money

developer_response.body:
more in depth tutorials to come!

Thanks for playing

reviews.review_description: Honestly I played for a while good game for what it is gives you YouTube vids to learn of easy to use and play

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing - im constantly making improvements -much more to come!
